feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Parent Trap
entry.summary:
Author: i8thecookie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,778Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 161

Summary: When Dick Grayson forces Clark to pretend to be his parent for a meeting with his headmaster, Clark expects an awkward conversation and maybe a lecture from Bruce afterward. He does not expect Gotham’s tabloids to decide he and Bruce Wayne are secretly together. But after one too many headlines about Bruce Wayne’s “mysterious co-parent,” pretending to date starts seeming like the easiest solution. That would probably be less of a problem if Clark wasn’t already half in love with him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Dick Grayson
  • Alfred Pennyworth

entry.title: friday, i'm in love
entry.summary:
Author: pommebeerbomb

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,375Chapters: 3/15Kudos: 38

Summary: Bruce and Clark are dormmates in MetU, but of course Clark is unaware of that. Clark's mysterious roommate has his name redacted in the lease papers and they've never ran into each other in their dormitory where they are both awake. Could their resolve go past a series of sticky notes exchange?

entry.title: Investment Opportunities
entry.summary:
Author: bitochondria

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,742Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 5

Summary: Although Clark swore off Bruce Wayne after their awkward-but-revelatory tryst at the charity gala a few months back, Clark is also a nice man who was raised right-- so, since he keeps crossing paths with Batman anyway, he tries his best to be the bigger person. Even if Bruce is kind of a jerk. And also really hot. But also still a jerk. When a case involves a Metropolis politician and a Gotham pharmaceutical corporation, however, he finds himself in much closer contact with Bruce than he intended or expected, and finds he doesn't really hate it.

entry.title: The Gravity of Small Things
entry.summary:
Author: Yevgeny

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,905Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 86

Summary: Clark Kent has spent his entire college career becoming impossible to notice. Bruce Wayne has spent his becoming impossible to know. By all reasonable calculations, they should have stayed strangers—two people on a campus of twenty-eight thousand, each too committed to their own disappearing act to stumble into anyone else's. Reasonable calculations, as it turns out, do not account for assigned seating, a shared diner booth at eleven p.m., or the oldest rule in physics: that two things with enough mass, brought close enough together, will always—eventually, without fail—begin to pull.

entry.title: Kryptomnesia
entry.summary:
Author: superguyfan

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,123Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 26

Summary: “Uh hi! Apologies for the intrusion, I’m Clark Kent with the Daily Planet, I just wanted to know if you might give me a quote on the van that attempted to run you and your colleagues over.” “Looks like you pretty much got the gist of it. I gotta thank you for the school teacher cover, it’s giving me an excuse to leave right now.” Clark gave a bewildered look as if he was trying to feign ignorance. “Drop the act. I may have almost been run over but that doesn’t mean I lost my eyes and ears in the process. A school teacher calling a hospital? Really?” Clark fixed his glasses, a small chuckle escaping his lips. “It’s true what they say then, you’re pretty good.” “Not sure if I would call doing my job ‘pretty good,’ but that’s why you’re the reporter and I’m the detective. Now if you’ll excuse me...” Bruce Wayne has it all: a solid career, a family fortune, but what happens when a huge conspiracy falls right into his lap and he suddenly finds himself in a load of trouble and no one but a rookie reporter to help him out?

entry.title: Bats in the Attic
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,490Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 54

Summary: Where he came from or what his motives were weren't immediately clear. He and the other Kryptonians attacked out of nowhere. At first, Bruce suspected some sort of mind control. But when Kal-El swatted Bruce's green kryptonite out of his hand like it was a child's toy, laughing and unaffected, he knew it was something deeper than that. But his contingencies failed, one after another. Bruce failed. Kal-El brought him, beaten half to death, here. Locked him in this lonely cell… and nursed him back to health. Almost tenderly. He's healed now, but no more able to escape then when he was to injured too move. He tells himself he's biding his time, waiting for an opportunity to escape. To fight back. For Kal-El to make a mistake that he can use. In the meantime, Kal-El comes to him every night.

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,697Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 255

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: But you can't take the circus from the boy
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,310Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 319

Summary: Damian Wayne has everything he's ever wanted. A beautiful husband. A precious child. A title of his own. Even his siblings, having experienced horrors beyond their years, are growing as people alongside him. But with everything in his life moving so smoothly, he can't help but wonder when the other shoe will drop. Happiness isn't something that comes easily to Demons, after all.

entry.title: That Sounds Good!
entry.summary:
Author: PartyPirate

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,898Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Bruce had no idea what to expect from first meeting Clark, The Man Of Steel, the man with the invulnerable skin, a child of the stars, the Earth's savior or maybe he could tell you exactly what he expected at first. He expected an imposter, a dastardly villain that was waiting for the perfect time to strike and take over the world. He didn’t look like what most people chalked an alien to look like. The only difference was that he had two little antennas that stuck out of his head and a blueish tint to his cheeks when he blushed from smiling too much. It got darker when he was embarrassed about something, which had piqued Batman's interest… well he should say Bruce’s. He will admit that the first thing he noticed besides the threat he posed to Earth, was the fact he had a nicely shaped jawline. Soft in places where Bruce’s was sharp and jagged. OR this just in Bruce Wayne gets sounded by his worm boyfriend

entry.title: Poisoned Sunset on a Terran Earth
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,294Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 48

Summary: CLARK KENT Clark loves Bruce Wayne. He loves his hair. He worships his body. He lives for the other’s every breath. Clark just didn’t realize that his love could suffocate.   BRUCE WAYNE Bruce loved Clark Kent. He loved the way he light up a room. His pure heart. His love for humanity. Bruce just wants to know when being love stopped being enough.   Alternatively: There’s only so much good that can come from loving a God.

entry.title: Come As You Are
entry.summary:
Author: everyonethinkstoomuch

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,302Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 187

Summary: 'Bruce was only watching to see how Clark’s sparring was coming along... He wasn’t watching Clark because he liked him or found him attractive. That would be foolish, and not sensible at all, and a distraction from the more important things in life, like beating up criminals every night and passing his exams.'When Clark Kent gets into yet another fight on a night out, his friend Diana suggests he joins the university boxing club to get used to fighting back, without killing someone with his superpowers. Bruce Wayne has just transferred to Metropolis City University and isn’t all too happy about it. Unlike everyone else he knows, he misses Gotham. And now he has to balance university, being Batman, and his feelings for Clark Kent - which he definitely doesn’t have.CONTENT WARNINGS: a little bit of swearing, implied abuse, implied & described mild violence, lots of discussion of dead parents.This is an AU drawing on several different versions of characters and also my own interpretation of them. Bruce is Battinson, Clark is Corensupes & Smallville. The others are a mix of all media types and kind of just what I want them to be!

entry.title: Save a horse (ride a cowboy)
entry.summary:
Author: sweethoneysuckle (blea_my)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 57,345Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 596

Summary: A small mistake that involved burning down of mayor's family yacht, lands city boy Bruce Wayne in his aunt's small town ranch in Texas where he's disciplined by the dust in his lungs, blisters on his hands and a cowboy, who makes him forget why he ever wanted to leave in the first place.

entry.title: Hiding with the animals
entry.summary:
Author: Dev_Hum4n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,298Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 6

Summary: In a world where hybrids are known of—but never truly seen—Bruce Wayne never expected one to be so close to home. As secrets begin to surface, he’s forced to confront a hidden truth: the people he loves most may not be entirely human. And in Gotham, being different has never been safe. Therefore, he must try and protect them from everything they’ve been through, even though he knows it’s going to be extremely difficult.

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 100,544Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Bruce and Clark
entry.summary:
Author: TS_Rhodes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,229Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 58

Summary: When ten-year-old Bruce Wayne's ride breaks down near the Kent farm, he meets ten-year-old Clark, and a friendship forms. The Kents are concerned about Bruce, since he is recently orphaned. Clark, whose powers are just starting to come in, pleads to keep Bruce as a friend. So they invite Bruce and his guardian Alfred to come back and stay the summer. And so it begins...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Childhood Friends
